caption: A man with glasses, a white button-down shirt, and a red bowtie wears a tall, spiky grey wig and black headphones while speaking into a microphone. He is seated in a room where the walls are decorated with numerous framed photographs and pieces of clothing. To his left, a professional microphone on a boom arm is visible. An on-screen logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST" appears in the lower-left area of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain static. The lighting is bright and consistent across the frames, highlighting the textures of his wig and the details of the gallery wall behind him.
